T

Tag - Class in appDomain
Tag represents a single XML tag occurrence found while scanning a document.
Tag(String, String, int, Tag.Type) - Constructor for class appDomain.Tag
Constructs a new Tag.
Tag.Type - Enum in appDomain
Enumerates the two kinds of tags this parser deals with.

testToArray() - Method in class unitTests.StackTest

testToArrayEArray_Insufficient() - Method in class unitTests.ArrayListTest

testToArrayEArray_Insufficient() - Method in class unitTests.DLLTest
Test method for implementations.MyDLLt#toArray(T[]) to return an array containing all items of the list when the array passed has insufficient length.

testToArrayEArray_InsufficientArray() - Method in class unitTests.QueueTest

testToArrayEArray_SufficientArray() - Method in class unitTests.QueueTest

testToArrayNullArray() - Method in class unitTests.StackTest

toArray(E[]) - Method in class implementations.MyArrayList
Returns an array containing all elements in this list in proper sequence.
toArray() - Method in class implementations.MyArrayList
Returns an Object array containing all elements in this list in proper sequence.
toArray(E[]) - Method in class implementations.MyDLL
Returns an array containing all elements in this list in proper sequence.
toArray() - Method in class implementations.MyDLL
Returns an Object array containing all elements in this list in proper sequence.
toArray() - Method in class implementations.MyQueue
Returns an Object array containing all elements in this queue in order from front to back.
toArray(E[]) - Method in class implementations.MyQueue
Returns an array containing all elements in this queue in order from front to back.
toArray() - Method in class implementations.MyStack
Returns an Object array containing all elements in this stack in order from top to bottom.
toArray(E[]) - Method in class implementations.MyStack
Returns an array containing all elements in this stack in order from top to bottom.
toArray(E[]) - Method in interface utilities.ListADT
Returns an array containing all of the elements in this list in proper sequence; the runtime type of the returned array is that of the specified array.
toArray() - Method in interface utilities.ListADT
Returns an array containing all of the elements in this list in proper sequence.
toArray() - Method in interface utilities.QueueADT
Returns an Object array containing all elements in this queue in proper sequence from front to back.
toArray(E[]) - Method in interface utilities.QueueADT
Returns an array containing all elements in this queue in proper sequence from front to back.
toArray() - Method in interface utilities.StackADT
Returns an Object array containing all elements in this stack in proper sequence from bottom to top.
toArray(E[]) - Method in interface utilities.StackADT
Returns an array containing all elements in this stack in proper sequence.
toString() - Method in class appDomain.Tag
Returns a string representation of this tag, formatted for use in the parser's error output, e.g.
A C D E G H I L M N P Q R S T U V X
